faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions About SeedVR2
faq.description: Everything you need to know about SeedVR2 online video and image upscaler
faq.tip: Still have questions? Contact Support

items.question: Is SeedVR2 free to use online?
items.answer: Yes! SeedVR2 offers a free tier that allows you to upscale videos up to 720p and images without any cost. No credit card required to get started. Premium plans unlock 4K/8K upscaling, faster processing, and batch operations for professional users.

items.question: Can I upscale anime videos with SeedVR2?
items.answer: Absolutely! SeedVR2 is specially optimized for anime video upscaling. Our AI preserves the unique art style, clean lines, and vibrant colors of anime content while enhancing resolution and removing compression artifacts. It's perfect for restoring old anime series or enhancing AI-generated anime videos.

items.question: How does SeedVR2 compare to FlashVSR?
items.answer: SeedVR2 uses single-step diffusion technology, making it approximately 10x faster than traditional multi-step methods like FlashVSR. While FlashVSR requires multiple inference steps, SeedVR2 achieves superior quality in just one step. Additionally, SeedVR2 offers better temporal consistency for video upscaling and handles both real-world and AIGC content effectively.

items.question: What video formats does SeedVR2 support?
items.answer: SeedVR2 supports all major video formats including MP4, WebM, AVI, MOV, and MKV. You can upload videos in any of these formats and export to your preferred format. We also support various codecs like H.264, H.265, VP9, and ProRes.

items.question: How long does the restoration process take?
items.answer: Processing time depends on video length and resolution. Typically, a 5-minute 1080p video takes about 3-5 minutes to upscale to 4K. Thanks to our single-step diffusion technology, SeedVR2 is 10x faster than traditional methods. Longer videos may take proportionally more time.

items.question: Is my video data safe and private?
items.answer: Absolutely. All video processing happens in a secure, encrypted environment. We never store your videos permanently or share them with third parties. Videos are automatically deleted after 24 hours for your privacy.

items.question: Do I need a GPU or technical knowledge to use SeedVR2?
items.answer: Not at all! SeedVR2 runs entirely in the cloud, so you don't need a high-end GPU or worry about VRAM/OOM errors. No ComfyUI setup, no Python installation required. Simply upload your video or image, and our AI handles everything automatically.

items.question: Can I process multiple videos at once?
items.answer: Yes! Pro and Business plans include batch processing capabilities. You can queue multiple videos and process them simultaneously, saving significant time for large projects. Free tier users can process one video at a time.
